uiBuilder.label: Dynamic Form
uiBuilder.description: A metadata-driven sectioned form: section cards with a multi-column grid of select / text / read-only fields. Values bind to a record; Save fires FORM_SAVED for a REST data resource.

properties.name: sections
properties.label: Sections (JSON array)
properties.description: Grouping metadata. Each: { sectionName, fields:[{ label, name, type:'select'|'text', options, placeholder, readonly, value }] }. Bind your external metadata here.

properties.name: values
properties.label: Values (JSON object)
properties.description: Current field values keyed by field name. Bind your table record here; the form updates this as the user edits.

properties.name: columns
properties.label: Columns
properties.description: Number of fields per row in each section.

properties.name: showSave
properties.label: Show Save button
properties.description: When on, shows the Save button that fires FORM_SAVED.

actions.name: FIELD_CHANGED
actions.label: Field changed
actions.description: Fired when any field changes. Payload: { name, value }.

actions.name: FORM_SAVED
actions.label: Form saved
actions.description: Fired when Save is clicked. Payload: { values }. Bind to a REST/transform data resource to perform the HTTP save.

payload.name: values
payload.label: Form values
payload.description: Object of all field values keyed by field name.
